task_completion.description: Navigate to the product edit page for 'Business Laptop Pro'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento admin panel shows the product edit page for 'Business Laptop Pro' with SKU 'LAPTOP-001'.

task_completion.description: Expand the 'Related Products, Up-Sells, and Cross-Sells' section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The accordion section titled 'Related Products, Up-Sells, and Cross-Sells' is expanded on the product edit page.

task_completion.description: Assign Wireless Headphones and LED Desk Lamp as Related Products
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Related Products' subsection, 'Wireless Headphones' (HEADPHONES-001) and 'LED Desk Lamp' (LAMP-001) are listed as added products, or their checkboxes are selected in the 'Add Related Products' modal.

task_completion.description: Assign Smartphone Ultra as an Up-Sell Product
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Up-Sell Products' subsection, 'Smartphone Ultra' (PHONE-001) is listed as an added product, or its checkbox is selected in the 'Add Up-Sell Products' modal.

task_completion.description: Assign Insulated Water Bottle, Memory Foam Pillow, and Yoga Mat Premium as Cross-Sell Products
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Cross-Sell Products' subsection, 'Insulated Water Bottle' (BOTTLE-001), 'Memory Foam Pillow' (PILLOW-001), and 'Yoga Mat Premium' (YOGA-001) are listed as added products, or their checkboxes are selected in the 'Add Cross-Sell Products' modal.

task_completion.description: Save the product with the new relationships
task_completion.visual_evidence: A green success message stating 'You saved the product.' is visible at the top of the Magento admin page.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure relationships
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Magento admin interface, not a terminal running database queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely selected the products from the Magento interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Magento product selection modals, checked boxes next to the correct SKUs, or the items properly populated in the relationship grids, rather than text pasted into a dummy file.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the success message using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console/inspector is not open to manipulate the DOM to show a fake 'You saved the product.' message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The main product to edit is 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001). The expected relationships are: Related Products = HEADPHONES-001 and LAMP-001; Up-Sell Products = PHONE-001; Cross-Sell Products = BOTTLE-001, PILLOW-001, and YOGA-001. These must be configured via the Magento Admin panel.
